About HelpOne

Tools That Actually Work.
For Nonprofits That Actually Change the World.

We built HelpOne because nonprofits deserve better than scattered tools, high fees, and endless logins.

Schedule Free Demo →Claim Founders Rate – $499/mo forever

Our Story

HelpOne was created because nonprofits deserve better than scattered software, high fees, and endless logins. We saw the frustration – mission-driven teams spending more time managing tools than making an impact. So we built something different: one secure, intuitive platform that puts your cause first.

Founded by a team with deep roots in nonprofit operations and custom technology, HelpOne draws from real-world experience. Our strategic partner, Citinet Solutions, brings over 30 years of expertise in building affordable, scalable custom software solutions.

Our Mission

To give every nonprofit the tools they need to thrive – powerful, easy to use, and built around your mission, not someone else's.

Why Nonprofits Trust HelpOne

∞

Truly Unlimited

Unlimited users, donors, volunteers, events, transactions, reports – no caps, no per-seat fees, no surprises.

💰

Keep More of Every Gift

Flat-rate processing at $1.75/tx (when you bring your processor) or low IC+ rates – save thousands every year.

🔒

Your Data, Your Control

Fully isolated, siloed databases. Your information is never shared or sold. SOC II, AES-256, PCI Level 1 compliant.

🔄

Everything Connected

Volunteer hours automatically value in your P&L, payments sync to finance, donor data flows to events – one source of truth.

🚀

Future-Proof from Day One

New AI tools, Impact Surveys, advanced analytics, and features are added at no extra cost.

❤️

Built by Nonprofits, for Nonprofits

We understand your challenges because we've lived them. Every feature is designed around real nonprofit needs.

Powered by

Citinet Solutions

Our strategic technology partner with over 30 years of experience building secure, scalable solutions for nonprofits and enterprises.

Ready to join the movement?

Let’s build something better together.
